summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned for merge, fix, or low-signal closeout because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and the fix artifact disables low-signal PR closeout.

actions.reason: Not a duplicate within this inventory shard and not safely closable; keep as related inventory work needing maintainer review outside this plan.

Focused and potentially useful, but blocked by proof and rebase/update requirements; keep related to linked issue #76352.
